title: Implement the dashboard SPA (Vite + React + TanStack Query)
description: Build the Vite + React SPA served by the dashboard Hono server. Pages: Dashboard (overview + next task + quick actions), Tasks (list + detail + brief + claim/release/finish), Issues (list + create), Messages (inbox), Prompts (list + render preview), Validation (results). All data fetched via the API routes from task-dashboard-server; SSE for live updates. Phase 5.2 of docs/roadmap.md.
acceptance: src/dashboard/client/ is a Vite project with @vitejs/plugin-react configured.
src/dashboard/client/src/api.ts wraps fetch() with CommandResult envelope handling (extract data, surface errors/warnings).
Dashboard page shows status counts, next ready task, and quick-action buttons.
Tasks page lists all tasks with status/priority filters; clicking a task opens detail view.
TaskDetail page shows full task + brief + claim/release/finish actions.
Issues page lists issues and has a create form.
Messages page shows inbox for a given agent (input field) and a thread view.
Prompts page lists prompts and renders a selected prompt for a given task/agent context.
Validation page shows errors/warnings from validateLedger.
EventSource on /api/events triggers refetch of relevant data (live updates).
Production build: `vite build` outputs to src/dashboard/client/dist/, Hono serves it.
Dev mode: `waystation dashboard --dev` starts Vite HMR + Hono proxy.
typecheck, biome check, and `waystation validate` all clean; full `bun test` green.
notes: STACK: React (not Preact/Solid — chosen for ecosystem depth, see lessons.md), Vite bundler, React Router (minimal — import react-router-dom from npm), no CSS framework (keep it simple, inline styles or a single CSS file). SSE: use browser EventSource API to connect to /api/events; on event, call queryClient.invalidateQueries(). TanStack Query can be added if fetching complexity warrants it, but V1 can use plain fetch + useEffect + useState. LLM features (prompt rewrite, agent suggestion) are DEFERRED per decision-dashboard-llm-features. RUN: C:\bun\bin\bun.exe run src/cli/index.ts dashboard --dev. Phase 5 of docs/roadmap.md.
